stance.prompt: side view, full body, young wuxia swordsman in deep blue robes, combat guard stance, sword DRAWN and held ready in front, empty scabbard visible at his hip, exaggerated confident wide stance, comical wild energy, clean white background
stance.notes: user pick over wider-stance candidates; generated via sprite-extractor extract --backend codex because rawgen is not exposed in current aiexp CLI

coil.prompt: Edit the image: the sheath at his hip is an empty scabbard -- remove the sword handle and pommel sticking out of it so it is just an empty green sheath. He keeps facing the same direction; keep the same coiled windup pose, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, drawn sword in hand, jade tassel, clean green background. Everything else stays unchanged.
coil.notes: user approved coil cand_2 after empty-scabbard correction; source pose from /tmp/wu-reanim/keyframes/light/coil/cand_2.png

thrust.prompt: Edit the image: the sheath at his hip is an empty scabbard -- remove the sword handle and pommel sticking out of it so it is just an empty green sheath. He keeps facing the same direction; keep the same forward thrust pose, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, drawn sword fully extended in hand, jade tassel, clean green background. Everything else stays unchanged.
thrust.notes: user approved thrust cand_2 after empty-scabbard correction; source pose from /tmp/wu-reanim/keyframes/light/thrust/cand_2.png

windup.prompt: Edit the image: the young wuxia swordsman performs a massive heavy-attack windup, sword raised far overhead and behind him, torso twisted back, knees bent in a wide rooted stance, comically telegraphed power, face focused, sword DRAWN in both hands, empty green scabbard visible at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out, same blue robes, white pants, black boots, jade tassel, side view, full body, clean green background. Everything else stays consistent.
windup.notes: user approved heavy windup cand_2; overhead cleave concept selected for Phase 4

strike.prompt: Edit the image: continue this exact heavy windup into the impact frame of a huge diagonal sword cleave. The swordsman has just swung downward and forward from overhead; blade cuts across the front on a broad diagonal slash, not a straight thrust. Body weight dropped low, torso committed forward, stance grounded and powerful, sword DRAWN in both hands, empty green scabbard still visible at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, jade tassel, side view, full body, clean green background. Everything else stays consistent.
strike.notes: user approved heavy strike cand_4; selected over thrust-like cand_2/cand_3 to keep heavy distinct from light

recover.prompt: Edit the image: continue this exact heavy cleave into the recovery follow-through. The swordsman has just completed the downward diagonal slash and is settling low, blade lowered across the front, same two-hand grip orientation as this image, hands still on the sword in the same relationship, body weight grounded, shoulders dropping after impact, no second attack, empty green scabbard still visible at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, jade tassel, side view, full body, clean green background. Everything else stays consistent.
recover.notes: user approved recover cand_2; image-to-image from approved heavy strike cand_4 to preserve grip and swing path
